name: Myshopping
body: [{"type": "h4", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "\nThis add-on was built by Maropost"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Set up the Myshopping Add-on"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install and set up the Myshopping add-on:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Sign up for a "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://merchant.myshopping.com.au/Signup1.aspx", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Myshopping"}]}, {"text": " account. Copy your account ID as you'll need to enter this into Maropost Commerce soon."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In your Maropost Commerce control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Other", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shopping feeds", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Find Myshopping and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enter your Account ID and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can modify the Feed URL, filtering products that you don\u2019t wish to push to Myshopping. To do this, click the "}, {"text": "Edit", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Scroll down to the "}, {"text": "File Builder", "bold": true}, {"text": " section and click the "}, {"text": "Filter", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab to make products, categories, pricing and other changes. Scroll down and click "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": ""}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Myshopping2.05T5g00000w5qAHEAY.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/Myshopping2.05T5g00000w5qAHEAY.png", "name": "image2", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "height": 248, "width": 700}}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To make changes to the feed scroll back up the top and click the "}, {"text": "Generate Data File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button and click "}, {"text": "Download Data File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to review the results of your changes."}]}]}]}]
